name: 한게임포커 클래식 : 7포커 홀덤 섯다 훌라 슬롯

detail.description:
Hangame Poker Classic captures the essence of casino gaming.
The 20-year tradition of PC Hangame Poker, now available on mobile, is now available on PC.

♠ Authentic mobile casino with poker games in one place♠
- When it comes to poker, Seven Poker is the name! The sophisticated and clean basics of poker.
- Hangame's popular Low Baduk!

- High-Lo! Thrilling battles of wits!
- Bold matches between skilled players! Hold'em.
- Add the flavor of Seotda to poker: LA Seotda.
- Receive, put, and discar
